customers_say: Customers find the smart door lock to be of professional quality and appreciate its efficient installation process. The lock works reliably and comes with a host of features and options, with one customer noting its multiple control methods. They find it easy to use and consider it good value for money, while also praising its stylish appearance and good service from Lavna Locks.

reviews.author: Amazon Customer
reviews.title: Solid smart lock, a few rough edges
reviews.body: Been using the LAVNA smart lock on my main wooden door for a while now. Installation was straightforward and the fingerprint sensor is genuinely fast and accurate. Having the built-in camera plus RFID card, PIN, and manual key backup means I’m never locked out even if the battery dies or the app acts up. What I like: • Fingerprint unlock is near-instant • App notifications when someone unlocks the door — good peace of mind • Anti-pry/tamper alarm adds real security • Manual key backup as a fail-safe What could improve: • App settings menu isn’t very intuitive — took some digging to find and ad
